profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Arkadia Digital Media Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an independent and integrated digital media company in Indonesia. The company operates Suara.com, a general news and information portal; Matamata.com, a celebrity and entertainment portal; HiTekno.com, a technology and gadget portal; Mobimoto.com, an automotive and motorsports portal; Guideku.com, a traveling and food and beverage portal; Clickmov.com, a video portal; Suara.com Regional, a regional news and information portal; Bolatimes.com, a soccer and sports portal; Dewiku, a female portal that provides content with topics of beauty, fashion, and relationships; Himedik.com, a health and medical portal; Yoursay.id, a user generated content portal; and Iklandisini.com, an advertising portal. It operates Arkadia Production, which produces video content for government institutions and corporations; and Arkadia Event, which provides event management services. In addition, the company offers content for mobile phone subscribers through Arkadia Mobile. The company was formerly known as PT Bukit Irama and changed its name to PT Arkadia Digital Media Tbk in February 2018. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.
